signals.headline: No Recent Confirmations, Announcements, or Resolutions Impacting Markets | NO | HIGH confidence**

No Recent Confirmations, Announcements, or Resolutions Impacting Markets | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Results mention no just-confirmed events (e.g., data releases, tweet counts) resolving or moving markets; odds update continuously with new info, but nothing "right now" as of early April 2026 snapshots[1][2][3].
